ddls:
CREATE TABLE "makes" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each make */,
  "make_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle make */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin for the make */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the make was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the make */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the logo of the make */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fuel type */,
  "octane_rating" INTEGER /* Octane rating of the fuel */,
  "energy_content" REAL /* Energy content of the fuel in MJ/L */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aspirations" (
  "aspiration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aspiration type */,
  "aspiration_name" TEXT /* Name of the aspiration type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the aspiration type */,
  "boost_pressure" REAL /* Boost pressure for turbocharged engines */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aspiration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_styles" (
  "body_style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each body style */,
  "body_style_name" TEXT /* Name of the body style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the body style */,
  "seating_arrangement" TEXT /* Seating arrangement */,
  "aerodynamic_coefficient" REAL /* Aerodynamic drag coefficient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("body_style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drive_wheels" (
  "drive_wheel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drive wheel configuration */,
  "drive_wheel_name" TEXT /* Name of the drive wheel configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drive wheel configuration */,
  "torque_distribution" TEXT /* Torque distribution between front and rear wheels */,
  "drivetrain_type" TEXT /* Type of drivetrain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drive_wheel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_types" (
  "engine_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine type */,
  "engine_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the engine type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the engine type */,
  "valvetrain_design" TEXT /* Design of the valvetrain */,
  "cooling_system" TEXT /* Type of cooling system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_systems" (
  "fuel_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel system */,
  "fuel_system_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fuel system */,
  "fuel_injection_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel injection */,
  "fuel_pump_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel pump */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, marketer, salesperson, financier) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_pricing" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "base_price" INTEGER /* Base price of the vehicle */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the vehicle */,
  "final_price" INTEGER /* Final price of the vehicle after discount */,
  "msrp" INTEGER /* Manufacturer's suggested retail price */,
  "invoice_price" INTEGER /* Invoice price to dealers */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the price is effective */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "zero_to_sixty_time" REAL /* Time taken to accelerate from 0 to 60 mph */,
  "quarter_mile_time" REAL /* Time taken to complete a quarter-mile */,
  "top_speed" INTEGER /* Top speed of the vehicle */,
  "braking_distance" REAL /* Braking distance from a certain speed */,
  "acceleration_time_0_to_100" REAL /* Time taken to accelerate from 0 to 100 km/h */,
  "braking_time" REAL /* Time taken to brake from a certain speed to 0 */,
  "handling_rating" TEXT /* Handling rating of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_safety" (
  "safety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "crash_rating" TEXT /* Crash rating of the vehicle */,
  "safety_features" TEXT /* Safety features of the vehicle */,
  "ncap_rating" TEXT /* NCAP rating of the vehicle */,
  "safety_warranty" TEXT /* Warranty for safety features */,
  "safety_tests" TEXT /* List of safety tests passed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("safety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sale */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the sale */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "sales_target" INTEGER /* Sales target for the period */,
  "actual_sales" INTEGER /* Actual sales for the period */,
  "sales_variance" INTEGER /* Variance between target and actual sales */,
  "sales_trend" TEXT /* Sales trend (up, down, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_service" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service performed */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the service */,
  "service_location" TEXT /* Location where the service was performed */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* Name of the service provider */,
  "service_duration" REAL /* Duration of the service in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "part_name" TEXT /* Name of the part */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the part */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the part */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the part (e.g., in stock, backordered) */,
  "lead_time" TEXT /* Lead time for delivery of the part */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id")
)
